message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Tactical Simulator EXP Farming: Best Progression Guide 2026",
  description: "Master Anime Tactical Simulator exp farming with our comprehensive 2026 guide. Learn world progression, unit evolution, and tower mode strategies to level up fast.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=EXP+Farming+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Tactical Simulator Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Anime tactical simulator exp farming**: Focus on clearing World stages and using lower-tier units for fusion to boost main squad levels.
- **World Progression**: Prioritize unlocking new worlds with Yen rather than grinding high-HP bosses in early areas.
- **Tower Mode**: Reach floors 10, 25, 50, and 100 as early as possible to unlock critical additional unit slots.
- **Unit Management**: Always keep Mythic and Secret units; fuse Common and Rare units to maximize your primary team's power.
- **Raid Efficiency**: Enter raids only after securing 3-4 Mythic units to farm Stat Cubes and Talent materials effectively.
</Callout>

In the competitive landscape of Roblox squad builders, mastering **anime tactical simulator exp farming** is the difference between being a casual player and a leaderboard legend. Efficiently leveling your units requires more than just mindless grinding; it demands a strategic understanding of world scaling, unit fusion, and the pivotal Tower Mode milestones. Whether you are a newcomer starting in World 1 or a veteran pushing through the high-HP jumps of World 3 and beyond, optimizing your experience gain is essential for survival. This guide provides a deep dive into the most effective methods for 2026, covering everything from initial questing to late-game raid farming. By following our structured progression path, you will ensure your Mythic units reach their maximum potential while avoiding common resource traps that hinder most players' development.

<Section icon={Map} title="Optimal World Progression and Scaling">

The foundation of **anime tactical simulator exp farming** lies in knowing when to move to the next world. Each new area increases the base experience and Yen drops from enemies, but it also introduces significant HP jumps that can stall your progress if your team is under-leveled.

| World | Unlock Cost | Primary Focus | EXP Efficiency |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **World 1** | Free | Kill quests, Unlock Tower | High (Early Game) |
| **World 2** | Yen | Stat upgrades, Mythic farming | Medium |
| **World 3** | High Yen | Unit evolution, Trait rerolling | High (Mid Game) |
| **World 4+** | Massive Yen | End-game raids, Secret units | Excellent |

<Callout type="warning" title="Avoid Boss Grinding">
In World 1 and 2, do not waste time on high-HP bosses if they take more than 60 seconds to clear. It is significantly more efficient for your overall progression to farm smaller mobs and progress through stages until your damage output allows for fast boss clears.
</Callout>

New players often make the mistake of staying in World 1 too long. Your goal should be to accumulate enough Yen to unlock World 2 as quickly as possible. World 2 introduces stat upgrades that provide a permanent multiplier to your damage, which in turn speeds up your clear times and experience gain.

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="The Fast Progression Path for 2026">

To maximize your efficiency in **anime tactical simulator exp farming**, you must follow a specific sequence of actions. This ensures you are always utilizing the best available multipliers and unit slots.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Redeem Active Codes">
    Immediately use codes like `RELEASE`, `UPDATE1`, and `LAUNCH` to secure Gems and Dungeon Keys. These resources allow you to summon high-tier units (Legendary or Mythic) right at the start, which drastically reduces the time spent in World 1.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Push Tower Mode to Floor 10">
    Tower Mode is not just for Gems. Reaching Floor 10 grants your first additional unit slot. Deploying more units simultaneously is the single biggest boost to your total team damage and experience distribution.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Implement Unit Fusion">
    Do not sell your Common or Rare units early on. Instead, use the Fusion system to feed these low-tier units into your main Mythic or Legendary carries. This provides a direct experience boost that is faster than passive combat leveling.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Unlock World 2 Stat Upgrades">
    Once you reach World 2, focus your Yen on permanent stat upgrades. These upgrades apply to all current and future units, making every subsequent hour of farming more productive.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="tip" title="Group Membership Bonus">
Join the official Roblox group to unlock specific codes like `DISCORD`. These often provide Talent Rerolls and Premium Rerolls which are essential for optimizing your units' damage output in the mid-game.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Unit Management and Rarity Strategy">

Effective **anime tactical simulator exp farming** requires a strict inventory management policy. Keeping the wrong units or selling valuable evolution materials can set your progress back by weeks.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="KEEP: Mythic & Secret">
    - **Never sell or fuse** these units.
    - Essential for late-game evolution.
    - Provide the highest base stats and scaling.
  </Card>
  <Card title="FUSE: Common to Epic">
    - Use as "EXP food" for main units.
    - Cleans up inventory space instantly.
    - Most efficient way to level up new pulls.
  </Card>
  <Card title="SELL: Excess Low-Tier">
    - Only sell when you need Souls.
    - Souls are required for unit evolution.
    - Focus on selling Rare/Epic for better Souls.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

| Unit Rarity | Best Use Case | Evolution Priority |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Common** | Immediate Fusion | None |
| **Rare** | Fusion / Soul Selling | Low |
| **Legendary** | Early Game Carry | Medium |
| **Mythic** | Core Team Member | **Critical** |
| **Secret** | End-game Dominance | **Maximum** |

<Callout type="success" title="Evolution Tip">
Evolution requires duplicate units and Souls. Start saving duplicate Mythics in World 2, but wait until World 3 to begin the evolution process when your Soul income from selling units is more stable.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Tower Mode and Unit Slot Milestones">

Tower Mode is the backbone of long-term account strength. While world farming gives you raw levels, Tower Mode provides the mechanical capacity to use those levels effectively. Every additional unit slot you unlock acts as a massive multiplier for your total squad power.

<Checklist
  id="tower-milestones"
  title="Critical Tower Floor Goals:"
  items={[
    "Floor 10: +1 Unit Slot (Essential for World 2)",
    "Floor 25: +1 Unit Slot (Required for early Raids)",
    "Floor 50: +1 Unit Slot and Rare Items",
    "Floor 100: +1 Unit Slot and Secret Unit"
  ]}
/>

| Floor Milestone | Reward Type | Impact on Farming |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Floor 10** | Unit Slot | 20% Damage Increase |
| **Floor 25** | Unit Slot | 15% Damage Increase |
| **Floor 75** | Exclusive Unit | High Utility |
| **Floor 100** | Unit Slot / Secret | Massive Power Spike |

<Callout type="info" title="Slot Priority">
Always prioritize Tower Mode over World progression if you are within 5 floors of a milestone. The extra slot is more valuable than the slight experience increase from the next world stage.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Raids, Talents, and Stat Cubes">

Once your team is established with at least 3-4 Mythic units, you should transition a portion of your time from standard **anime tactical simulator exp farming** to Raid farming. Raids provide the materials necessary for permanent account-wide power-ups.

**Key Raid Rewards:**
- **Stat Cubes**: Used to upgrade Talents, providing permanent stat increases to all units.
- **Medals**: Can be exchanged for exclusive items and high-tier upgrade materials.
- **Rare Materials**: Necessary for crafting and evolving the strongest units in the game.

| Material | Primary Source | Usage |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Stat Cubes** | Raids / Dungeons | Talent Upgrades |
| **Medals** | Raids | Item Exchange |
| **Souls** | Selling Units | Evolution |
| **Gems** | Codes / Tower | Unit Summons |

<Callout type="tip" title="Talent Strategy">
Talents are account-wide. Investing Stat Cubes into Damage and EXP Gain talents early will pay dividends across every world and every unit you ever own.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Performance Optimization for Farming">

High-level raids and late-game worlds can cause significant lag, which reduces your farming efficiency. To maintain the fastest **anime tactical simulator exp farming** rates, you must optimize your game settings.

1.  **Disable Ability VFX**: This is the most effective way to prevent frame drops during busy combat encounters.
2.  **Turn Off Raid Effects**: Specifically designed to keep the game smooth when multiple players are using high-tier Mythic abilities.
3.  **Lower Graphics Quality**: Set Roblox graphics to "Manual" and keep it at 1-3 for maximum FPS stability.
4.  **Reduce View Distance**: Helps the game engine focus resources on the immediate combat area.

<Callout type="warning" title="Lag Impact">
Lag doesn't just look bad; it can cause your units to miss attack cycles, effectively lowering your damage per second (DPS) and slowing down your experience gain per hour.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Anime Tactical Simulator FAQ">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What is the fastest way to level up units in Anime Tactical Simulator?",
    answer: "The fastest way is through Unit Fusion. Feed your main Mythic units all the Common, Rare, and Epic units you pull from summons. This provides an immediate experience boost that far exceeds passive farming in early worlds."
  },
  {
    question: "When should I start farming Raids?",
    answer: "You should start farming Raids once you have at least 3-4 Mythic units at level 50+ and have unlocked at least two extra unit slots from Tower Mode. Entering raids too early is inefficient due to the high HP of raid bosses."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I get more unit slots?",
    answer: "Unit slots are primarily unlocked through Tower Mode. Key milestones are floors 10, 25, 50, and 100. Each of these floors grants an additional deployment slot, which is crucial for maximizing your total team damage."
  },
  {
    question: "Should I spend Gems on rerolls or summons?",
    answer: "In the early game, always spend Gems on summons to build a full team of Mythic units. Only start spending resources on Trait and Talent rerolls once you have a stable end-game team that you plan to keep long-term."
  }
]} />

</Section>
